description.value: While wearing these bracers, you gain a +2 bonus to AC if you are wearing no armor and using no @item[shield|PHB].
Hannah makes three attacks, at least one of which must be a melee attack.
Hannah takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

Ranged Attack Roll: [[/r 1d20+9]]{+9}, range 150/600 ft. Hit: 18 ([[/damage 3d8 + 5 type=piercing]]), magic damage, and the target's @variantrule[Speed|XPHB] decreases by 10 feet until the end of the target's next turn.

Melee Weapon Attack: [[/r 1d20+9]]{+9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 ([[/damage 1d8 + 5]]) bludgeoning or force damage (Hannah's choice), and if the target is a creature, it must succeed on a [[/save ability=con dc=15]] saving throw or be &Reference[condition=stunned] until the start of Hannah's next turn.
In response to being hit by an attack whose damage includes bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage, Hannah reduces the attack’s total damage against her by [[/r 1d10 + 15]].

If Hannah is subjected to an effect that allows her to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, she instead takes no damage if she succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if she fails.
Hannah has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put her to sleep.
While Hannah is wearing no armor, her AC includes her Wisdom modifier.

In response to a creature within 5 feet of Hannah taking damage, she causes that creature not to take the damage. Instead, Hannah takes it. This damage to her can’t be reduced or prevented in any way.
Hannah reduces the bludgeoning damage she takes from a fall by 50.
